prompt: Please review my DPO config for Llama-3.1-8B (running on top of my SFT checkpoint): beta=5, learning_rate=2e-5, num_train_epochs=3, max_length=4096, standard sigmoid DPO loss in TRL, effective batch 32. The model's outputs are getting repetitive and GSM8K dropped 15 points. What's wrong?
assertions: Identifies learning_rate=2e-5 as the dominant error and recommends ~5e-7 (3e-7 to 1e-6 range)
Explains the beta-loss coupling: beta=5 belongs to length-normalized DPO; standard sigmoid uses ~0.01-0.1
Cites at least one published run/config (Zephyr, Tulu 3, SimPO, or DPO paper) for the numbers
Links repetition/GSM8K regression to oversized LR and suggests monitoring (length stats or GSM8K probe)
